title: Andy's Vanilla+ Modpack
description: Multiple exploration and adventure type mods. Many new mobs, structures, biomes, weapons, armour, enchantments and lots of new blocks. Also a heavy focus on immersion and optimisation without taking away from the vanilla feel of Minecraft.
body: Multiple exploration and adventure type mods. Many new mobs, structures, biomes, weapons, armour, enchantments and lots of new blocks. Also a heavy focus on immersion and optimisation without taking away from the vanilla feel of Minecraft. Recommended to use Photon (Voxy support) shaderpack, but all shaderpacks should work
